/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libjoints_interface.so -o /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libjoints_interface.so CMakeFiles/joints_interface.dir/src/calibration_manager.cpp.o /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libactionlib.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libcan_driver.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libmcp_can_rpi.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libcontroller_manager.so -ltinyxml2 /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libclass_loader.so -lPocoFoundation -ldl /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libroslib.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librospack.so -lpython2.7 -lboost_program_options -ltinyxml /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libttl_driver.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libcommon.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libdynamixel_sdk.so /home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libserial.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libroscpp.so -lboost_filesystem -lboost_signals /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/kinetic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic -lpthread -lconsole_bridge -lwiringPi -lrt -lcrypt -lrt -lpthread -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/kinetic/lib:/home/niryo/catkin_ws/devel/lib:
